items.title: Manga '7-nin no Nemurihime' Gets TV Anime in 2027
items.summary: Production company Avex Pictures opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Lee Fiok's 7-nin no Nemurihime (Seven Sleeping Beauties) manga on Tuesday, revealing the main cast, staff, and a super teas
